description: CompositionBlue ethnic print kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, round neck, yoke with a dotted pattern and gold tape detailing along the neckline, short sleeves with gold tape detailing on the cuffs and a vented hemFitRegularWash careGentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm ironInspired by traditional Indian prints and crafted with a classic cut, this kurta from vishudh makes a fabulous addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The yoke with its dotted pattern and gold tape detailing add zing to the garment. Team it with jeans or leggings and chunky earrings.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
